mapper.select: SELECT email, company, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER ORDER BY company, role, email
SELECT email, company, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.INTERNAL_USER (email, company, role, is_active) VALUES (#{email}, #{company}, #{role}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.INTERNAL_USER SET company = #{company}, role = #{role}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT email FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER WHERE role = #{role} AND is_active = 1
SELECT email FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER WHERE company = #{company} AND is_active = 1
